title: Goodfellaz Server Architecture
description: The official component for servers running the Goodfellaz Vanilla+ modpack.
body:
![Goodfellaz Server Architecture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f612b901c9c6b30099585bf26756ec076d7d66d.png)

### ⚠️ Server Only
Running a server for Goodfellaz Vanilla+? This pack handles the backend so everything stays stable and smooth.

This is not intended for client use. Clients may download the standard [Goodfellaz Vanilla+](https://modrinth.com/project/2JkEkB0A) modpack.

### Goodfellaz Server Architecture
Designed for admins who want a stable, high-performance environment with zero hassle. This pack provides the essential backend utilities and optimization tools needed to support Vanilla+ players while keeping the core gameplay, progression, and balance strictly untouched.

### Credentials
This is a curated collection of community-made mods. All rights and credit belong to the original authors.
